series_metadata.series_title: Reconciliation documents for the entire STAR Ohio investment fund
series_metadata.series_description: A packet of documents that includes a report from the investment inventory software that shows the daily holdings and daily transactions for a given day for the entire STAR Ohio investment fund, which is managed by the Treasurer pursuant to R.C. 135.45 These reports are reconciled against bank data that is downloaded from a BAI file into an MS Access database. Supporting documentation is also included, when necessary, to explain any discrepancies or exceptions.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: conclusion of current fiscal year, and an additional 6 fiscal years. ; Electronic: conclusion of current fiscal year, and an additional 6 fiscal years
